title: Frame Property
description: Sets the frame for positioning an object's search position.
notes:
The Frame property is very useful for aligning objects to specific positions which respect to other objects found positions.  For more details see the Frame object explanation in Vision Objects.

The Frame property can be used for any Frame objects which have been defined beforehand when the associated Frame object is located prior to the vision object in the Object Execution Step.
